_comment: Gifty audio. voice/* = ElevenLabs (Gifty1 voice); sfx/* = chat-specific cues only (general UI sounds stay in src/lib/sounds.ts, procedural). Pool = pick one at random; single src = one cue.

greeting.use: play one at random when the user opens/clicks Gifty's face to start a chat

backchannel.use: soft hum/ack ('hmm', 'mm', 'oh') — sprinkle occasionally when Gifty starts replying, not every message

lines._comment: 1:1 named catchphrases for specific app moments (not a random pool).

sfx._comment: ONLY chat-specific cues. General UI sounds (click/success/error/pop/etc.) are procedural in src/lib/sounds.ts — do not duplicate them here.

thinking.use: loop softly while the agent is generating; stop on first token

typingTick.use: subtle per-chunk tick while streaming (throttle, not every char)

typingEllipsis.use: the '…' bounce for a 'Gifty is typing' indicator
